raw_excerpt: We're releasing GPT-5.5, our smartest and most intuitive to use model yet... April 23, 2026. Update on April 24, 2026: GPT-5.5 and GPT-5.5 Pro are now available in the API. Terminal-Bench 2.0: 82.7% (vs GPT-5.4 75.1%). GDPval: 84.9%. SWE-Bench Pro: 58.6%. OSWorld-Verified: 78.7%. Tau2-bench Telecom: 98.0%. CyberGym: 81.8%. FrontierMath Tier 4: 35.4%. 1M context. $5/M input, $30/M output for gpt-5.5. Treated as High under Preparedness Framework for bio/cyber. GPT-Rosalind rolled out May 29, 2026 for biodefense.
